The post [A smoother navigation experience in GitHub Mobile for Android](https://github.blog/changelog/2026-03-20-a-smoother-navigation-experience-in-github-mobile-for-android) appeared first on [The GitHub Blog](https://github.blog).
Title: A smoother navigation experience in GitHub Mobile for Android
EnhancedContent:
We’ve revamped navigation in GitHub Mobile for Android to create a more consistent and intuitive experience across the app. With this update, moving between key areas such as **Home** and **Inbox** feels smoother, the bottom navigation is more consistently available where it matters, and each tab does a better job of preserving your place as you explore.

That means you can switch contexts more easily, pick up where you left off, and get back to important destinations faster. Overall, this refresh makes the app feel more connected, predictable, and efficient, helping you stay focused on your work.

This is now available on [the latest production build of GitHub Mobile on Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.github.android).

Join the discussion within [GitHub Community](https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/categories/announcements).
